title: Math for ML Quiz
description: Test your linear algebra and probability for ML knowledge.

questions.question: What does the dot product of two vectors measure?

options.text: Their element-wise multiplication summed — a measure of similarity/alignment
The cross product of the vectors
The angle between the two vectors in radians

questions.question: In gradient descent, what does the learning rate control?

options.text: How large a step we take in the direction of the negative gradient at each update
The initial values of the model weights
The batch size for mini-batch gradient descent

questions.question: What is PCA (Principal Component Analysis) used for?

options.text: A classification algorithm for labelled data
Dimensionality reduction — finding directions of maximum variance to represent data in fewer dimensions
Selecting which features to include by importance score
